domain: industrial sensors, test instruments, measurement fixtures, and calibration hardware

ideas.product_context: Rugged sensor body used on automated machine tools to detect carriage or fixture position in oily environments.
ideas.core_function: Holds an inductive sensing coil, connector insert, sealing features, and wrench flats while presenting a precise threaded mounting interface.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical stainless sensor barrel with external metric threads, hex flats, stepped internal bore, front sensing lip, O-ring groove, and rear connector pocket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines coaxial turned geometry, external threading, wrench flats intersecting a cylinder, sealing grooves, thin front lips, and nested internal bores.

ideas.idea_title: Dial Indicator Magnetic Base Swivel Joint
ideas.product_context: Articulated positioning hardware for holding a dial indicator on inspection tables or machine frames.
ideas.core_function: Allows a metrology arm to pivot and lock at a chosen angle without slipping under indicator load.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined ball-and-socket clamp yoke with split lugs, spherical seat, cross bolt bore, serrated friction faces, and threaded arm mount.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires spherical contact surfaces, split clamp geometry, coaxial and offset bores, lug symmetry, serrations, and assembly-critical clearances.

ideas.product_context: Bench or field calibration fixture for comparing pressure transmitters against a reference gauge.
ideas.core_function: Routes pneumatic or hydraulic pressure between pump input, reference gauge, device under test, bleed valve, and isolation valve.
ideas.likely_main_part: Rectangular stainless manifold block with intersecting drilled passages, multiple threaded ports, valve cavities, chamfered edges, mounting feet, and engraved port pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests hidden internal channel logic, orthogonal port placement, pipe-thread bosses, valve counterbores, sealing faces, and manufacturable drilling paths.

ideas.product_context: Process instrumentation fitting used to mount a thermocouple probe into a heated chamber or pipe wall.
ideas.core_function: Compresses a ferrule around the probe sheath while sealing into a threaded process port.
ideas.likely_main_part: Hex-body adapter with male pipe thread, tapered ferrule cone, through bore, rear compression nut interface, wrench flats, and lead-in chamfers.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Mixes tapered sealing cones, axial through holes, external process threads, hex-prism-to-cylinder transitions, small clearances, and chamfered compression features.

ideas.product_context: Adjustable mount for aiming a compact laser triangulation sensor at a production inspection target.
ideas.core_function: Clamps the sensor body and provides fine angular alignment while preserving optical clearance around the emitter and receiver window.
ideas.likely_main_part: Split rectangular cradle with semicircular clamp bore, slotted adjustment arc, datum mounting face, captive screw pockets, and relieved optical window opening.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests partial cylindrical cuts through blocky geometry, curved slots, asymmetric reliefs, thin clamp bridges, screw bosses, and datum-critical mounting surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Precision storage and handling insert for certified mass standards used in scale and balance calibration labs.
ideas.core_function: Locates several cylindrical calibration weights without contact damage and provides finger access for removal.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined aluminum tray insert with stepped circular pockets, soft-radius finger scoops, engraved weight labels, dowel locating holes, and perimeter retaining ledge.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes repeated pocket patterns with varying diameters, blended access cutouts, shallow engraving fields, ledges, fillets, and ergonomic clearance geometry.

ideas.product_context: Mechanical adapter used to mount an accelerometer onto curved motor housings or bearing blocks during vibration testing.
ideas.core_function: Provides a flat sensor mounting pad and a secure threaded connection to a non-flat machine surface.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low-profile circular adapter puck with curved underside saddle, central threaded stud hole, top precision pad, spanner holes, and anti-rotation flats.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges representation of concave saddle surfaces, flat-to-curved transitions, threaded axial features, tool-access holes, and orientation-specific mounting faces.

ideas.product_context: Shop-floor reference artifact for checking outside micrometers and digital calipers at several known distances.
ideas.core_function: Provides multiple precision step heights and measuring lands in one rigid calibration object.
ideas.likely_main_part: Ground steel stepped gauge bar with ascending precision shoulders, relief grooves at step roots, chamfered handling ends, serial-number pad, and case locating notch.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests exact stepped datum relationships, sharp-but-relieved inside corners, tolerance-sensitive measuring faces, asymmetric notch placement, and labeled nonfunctional surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Inline measurement cell for holding conductivity or pH probes in a controlled liquid sample stream.
ideas.core_function: Directs fluid past the sensing tip while sealing threaded probe ports and tube connections.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined polymer or stainless flow cell body with central flow chamber, angled probe port, inlet and outlet tube bosses, O-ring glands, and transparent cover screw pattern.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines angled intersecting bores, internal fluid cavity, sealing grooves, raised tube bosses, cover fastener patterns, and asymmetric inspection geometry.

ideas.product_context: Adapter hub for coupling a rotary torque transducer to a reaction arm during motor or gearbox testing.
ideas.core_function: Transfers torque reaction to a fixed arm while keeping the sensor shaft concentric and accessible.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical hub with keyed central bore, radial reaction-arm lug, bolt circle, split clamp slot, dowel holes, and filleted torque-transfer shoulders.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests keyed bores, radial protrusions from rotational bodies, bolt-circle patterns, clamp slots crossing round geometry, heavy fillets, and load-path-specific shape.
